task_name: Builder to Desktop Visible Popup Proof
scope: goat-desktop live or controlled local acceptance
goal: Prove that a Builder-style cue reaches GOAT Desktop and becomes a visible popup proposal without desktop effects before user approval.
required_evidence: checked commit and clean/dirty working tree state
local /healthz result when a bridge is running
desktopActions=false, mouseActions=false, keyboardActions=false, mayExecute=false before approval
artifact path for the report or screenshot when safe to keep
dod: Acceptance report or controlled proof artifact exists
Failure mode is visible if Builder env or websocket config is missing
No action permission is expanded by the proof
